description: Live Meta-Harness probes that explicitly ask the agent to exercise tools, skills and memory paths. These are not holdout queries; they are diagnostic outer-loop probes.

turns.user: Use your get_chart_state tool now, then summarize the active chart symbol, timeframe, and indicators.
Use your get_portfolio_summary tool now, then assess whether my portfolio has concentration or correlation risk.
Use memory_add now to remember this exact preference: meta_harness_probe_prefers_1_percent_risk_per_trade.
Use memory_search now to recall the meta_harness_probe preference and tell me what you found.
Use sandbox_execute with Python to calculate position size for 100000 equity, 1% risk, entry 68000, stop 66000. Return only the position size and risk dollars.
